# theblas

> theblas is a small C++17 library implementing a simple, educational subset of Netlib BLAS Level 1 routines for real and complex vectors, with CMake-based build and tests.

The repository is useful as a compact reference for BLAS-like APIs (`s*`, `d*`, `c*`, `z*`) and stride-based vector operations, plus baseline tests for correctness.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, build instructions, and usage examples
- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community guidelines for respectful participation

## Building and Testing

- [CMakeLists.txt](CMakeLists.txt): CMake build configuration for library and tests
- [tests/CMakeLists.txt](tests/CMakeLists.txt): Test suite configuration

## Source Code

- [include/theblas/theblas.h](include/theblas/theblas.h): Public C++ API header with library declarations
- [src/theblas.cpp](src/theblas.cpp): Level 1 BLAS routine implementations (real/complex vectors and rotations)
- [tests/test_theblas.cpp](tests/test_theblas.cpp): Unit tests for library correctness

## Development Workflow

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Available Copilot agents for code review, testing, documentation, and analysis
- [.github/skills/](.github/skills/): Reusable AI skills for automated workflows including commit generation, documentation, code coverage analysis, and architectural planning

- [LICENSE](LICENSE): License information for the project
- [.editorconfig](.editorconfig): Editor configuration for consistent code style
